specific_mechanism: Aerodynamic boundary layer separates when adverse pressure gradient overcomes momentum; vortex generators delay separation by adding turbulent mixing
llm_application: LLM attention boundary-layer separation: attention degrades when context length exceeds effective receptive field; periodic 'attention sink' tokens act as vortex generators delaying separation.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes aerodynamics spectral-allocation mapping as proposed.
